internalName: Lekiri Villa & Wellness (Al-Barakat Property), Kalim Beach
place: Kalim Beach, Patong, Kathu District, Phuket 83150, Thailand
title: Lekiri Villa & Wellness — Sea-View Pool Villas above Kalim Beach
blurb: A boutique wellness retreat of just six private-pool villas resting above Kalim Beach, minutes north of Patong on Phuket's west coast — sea-and-sky views, tropical greenery, and warm natural interiors of wood and stone. Two- and three-bedroom homes with private pools, shared fitness, café and outdoor-dining amenities. Leasehold, off-plan. Type A (3-bed) from ฿40M — special from ฿35M; Type B (2-bed) from ฿42.5M — special from ฿36.1M.
detail:
LeKiri rests quietly above Kalim Beach, where the sea breeze meets the forest air — a boutique wellness sanctuary of only six private-pool villas set between the sea and the gentle hills, minutes north of Patong on Phuket's west coast. The idea is calm: sunlight filtering through tropical leaves, open airy volumes, and warm natural interiors of wood and stone made for slow mornings and quiet evenings. Just 500 m to Kalim Beach and around 2.7 km to Patong, with Central Patong, Jungceylon and the island's beach clubs, dining and golf all close by; Phuket International Airport is about 32 km away.

The collection offers two layouts, each with its own private pool and framed sea views. Type A is a three-bedroom, three-bathroom villa of about 160 m² usable (211–225 m² built-up), with double-height living volumes that open to the pool and horizon. Type B is a two-bedroom, two-bathroom home of about 188 m² usable (206–274 m² built-up), where living spaces open gently to the sea and daylight. Interiors pair warm timber, soft textures and living greenery, with bedrooms, spa-like bathrooms and a multipurpose room in the larger homes. Owners share the resort's wellness-focused amenities — a fitness pavilion, café and restaurant, outdoor dining and landscaped garden terraces with a waterfall feature, watched over by 24-hour security.

Current price list — special offer (sale price · special price):
Type A · 3 bed / 3 bath · ~160 m² usable
  A1 — ฿40,000,000 · special ฿35,000,000
  A2 — ฿40,500,000 · special ฿35,000,000
  A3 — ฿41,500,000 · special ฿35,275,000
  A4 — ฿44,000,000 · special ฿37,400,000
Type B · 2 bed / 2 bath · ~188 m² usable
  B1 — ฿43,500,000 · special ฿36,975,000
  B2 — ฿42,500,000 · special ฿36,125,000

Offered leasehold. Reserved with ฿1,000,000 (credited to the first payment), then 30% on signing the leasehold agreement, 40% at mid-construction (structure and MEP substantially complete), and 30% on completion, handover and lease registration. Price list and conditions are subject to change without prior notice.

features.l: Above Kalim Beach · 500 m to sand
